description: Phenotype Descriptor Library: Detailed definitions of cellular phenotypes identifiable via holotomography

phenotypes.name: Cell Volume Increase (Swelling)
phenotypes.description: Increase in total cell volume typically associated with necrotic or early injury responses. Measured via 3D RI tomogram segmentation.
phenotypes.measurement_method: 3D volume rendering from RI tomogram; threshold-based segmentation

phenotypes.name: Nuclear Condensation
phenotypes.description: Reduction in nuclear volume with increased RI density, indicative of chromatin condensation during apoptosis.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Nuclear segmentation from RI tomogram; RI histogram analysis of nuclear region

phenotypes.name: Membrane Blebbing
phenotypes.description: Formation of bulge-like protrusions on the cell membrane, a hallmark of late-stage apoptosis.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Surface roughness analysis from 3D RI tomogram; sphericity index calculation

quantitative_threshold.severe: Sphericity index decrease >20%, multiple large blebs

phenotypes.name: Cell Cycle Arrest (G1/S Phase)
phenotypes.description: Arrest of cell division at G1/S checkpoint, observable as increased cell size uniformity and reduced mitotic figures.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Population-level dry mass distribution analysis; cell size distribution narrowing

quantitative_threshold.moderate: CV of dry mass decreases 20-40%, reduced mitotic index
quantitative_threshold.severe: CV of dry mass decreases >40%, no mitotic figures

phenotypes.name: Cell Size Uniformity Change
phenotypes.description: Shift in cell size distribution indicating synchronized or arrested cell populations.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Projected area and volume distribution analysis across cell population

phenotypes.name: Dry Mass Reduction
phenotypes.description: Decrease in total cellular dry mass indicating reduced protein/biomolecule content, typically during cytostatic or catabolic responses.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Integrated RI-based dry mass calculation (dn/dc method)

phenotypes.name: Morphological Flattening
phenotypes.description: Decrease in cell height with maintained or increased projected area, indicating cytoskeletal reorganization.
phenotypes.measurement_method: 3D aspect ratio calculation (height/projected area) from RI tomogram

phenotypes.name: Reduced Motility / Migration
phenotypes.description: Decrease in cell migration speed and directionality, observable via time-lapse holotomography.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Time-lapse tracking; displacement and velocity analysis

phenotypes.name: Cytoplasmic Vacuolization
phenotypes.description: Formation of visible vacuoles in the cytoplasm, detectable as low-RI regions within the cell body.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Intracellular RI distribution analysis; local minima detection in cytoplasmic region

phenotypes.name: Refractive Index Increase (Cytoplasm)
phenotypes.description: Global increase in cytoplasmic RI indicating increased molecular density/concentration.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Mean RI calculation within cytoplasmic ROI

phenotypes.name: T-cell Activation Morphology
phenotypes.description: Morphological changes in T-cells upon activation: volume increase, RI redistribution, and pseudopodia formation.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Single-cell volume and RI distribution analysis in immune cell population

phenotypes.name: Immune Cell Clustering
phenotypes.description: Spatial aggregation of immune cells, often around target cells in co-culture systems.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Spatial distribution analysis; nearest-neighbor distance calculation; cluster identification

phenotypes.name: Tumor Cell Lysis (Co-culture)
phenotypes.description: Destruction of tumor cells by immune effector cells in co-culture, observable as tumor cell morphological disruption.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Time-lapse monitoring of tumor cell integrity; counting lysis events

phenotypes.name: Cell Shrinkage
phenotypes.description: Decrease in cell volume typically associated with apoptosis, distinguished from swelling in necrosis.
phenotypes.measurement_method: 3D volume rendering from RI tomogram with time-course tracking

phenotypes.name: Apoptotic Body Formation
phenotypes.description: Fragmentation of the dying cell into membrane-bound vesicles (apoptotic bodies) at the terminal stage of apoptosis.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Particle counting and size analysis post-fragmentation from RI tomogram

phenotypes.name: Selective Cell Death in Target-positive Population
phenotypes.description: Preferential cell death in antigen-expressing cells while antigen-negative cells remain viable.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Differential viability analysis in mixed populations using RI-based cell classification

phenotypes.name: Internalization Vesicle Formation
phenotypes.description: Formation of endocytic vesicles upon receptor-ligand binding and internalization.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Intracellular particle tracking; vesicle counting from RI contrast

phenotypes.name: Immune Cell Morphology Change (Inactivation)
phenotypes.description: Morphological shift toward quiescent/inactivated state in immune cells upon immunosuppressive treatment.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Volume, RI distribution, and shape analysis of immune cell populations

quantitative_threshold.severe: Volume decrease >30%, complete rounding with homogeneous RI

phenotypes.name: Reduced Cell Proliferation
phenotypes.description: Decreased rate of cell division observable as reduced population growth and fewer mitotic events.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Cell counting over time; mitotic event detection from morphological changes

quantitative_threshold.severe: Growth rate reduction >70% or complete arrest

phenotypes.name: Cell Volume Decrease
phenotypes.description: General reduction in cell volume across the population, distinct from apoptotic shrinkage by maintained viability.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Population-level volume distribution from 3D RI tomograms

phenotypes.name: Lipid Droplet Accumulation (Steatosis)
phenotypes.description: Accumulation of lipid droplets in hepatocytes, visible as high-RI spherical inclusions in the cytoplasm.
phenotypes.measurement_method: High-RI spherical object detection and quantification within cytoplasm

phenotypes.name: Hepatocyte Swelling
phenotypes.description: Increase in hepatocyte volume indicating cellular injury or osmotic imbalance in liver cell models.
phenotypes.measurement_method: 3D volume measurement from RI tomogram in hepatocyte cultures

phenotypes.name: Mitochondrial Morphology Change
phenotypes.description: Alterations in mitochondrial network organization detectable as RI texture changes in the perinuclear region.
phenotypes.measurement_method: Texture analysis and RI heterogeneity measurement in perinuclear cytoplasmic region

quantitative_threshold.severe: RI texture change >30%, fragmented mitochondrial network
